popularStory.headline:
William John Diffee II
(17 May 1732 – 2 December 1790)
popularStory.description:
William Diffee, Jr. is the son of William Diffee, Sr. and his wife Mary 'Elizabeth' York, sister to Jeremiah York I.

The Jeremiah York I family went through a major transition when Sarah Wilson died …

zh.lifeSummary: 當William Diffee Jr於1732年5月17日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州諾圖波藍德維其米可時，他的父親William John Diffee22歲，母親Mary Elizabeth York39歲。他和Elizabeth Ann York至少有4個兒子和5個女兒。他去世於1790年12月2日在美國北卡羅來納州蘭多夫享年58歲，埋葬在美國北卡羅來納州蘭多夫格雷斯 查阿培爾奧德爾 特洛格頓 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Diffee
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Diffey  . Compare   Defee  .

History: William Diffee, from whom present-day American bearers of this name are descended, was born c. 1710, probably in Ireland, and died in 1790 in Randolph County, NC. His surname was also spelled Diffey, while his descendants also bear the surname Defee .

variants.name: Diffey
meanings: English (Dorset): perhaps a nickname from Anglo-Norman French defaé, defieu ‘faithless, disloyal’. Compare Diffee .

variants.name: Defee
meanings: History: This surname is borne by the descendants of William Diffee, born c. 1710, probably in Ireland, died 1790 in Randolph County, NC. The same spelling is recorded in London, England, in the 18th century.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.description: "Patrick Henry made his ""Give me Liberty or Give me Death"" speech in Richmond Virginia."

historicEvents.title: The First Constitution
historicEvents.description: Serving the newly created United States of America as the first constitution, the Articles of Confederation were an agreement among the 13 original states preserving the independence and sovereignty of the states. But with a limited central government, the Constitutional Convention came together to replace the Articles of Confederation with a more established Constitution and central government on where the states can be represented and voice their concerns and comments to build up the nation.

historicEvents.title: Becomes 12th State
historicEvents.description: On November 21, 1789, North Carolina became the 12th state in the Union.

en.lifeSummary: When William Diffee Jr was born on 17 May 1732, in Wicomico, Northumberland, Virginia, British Colonial America, his father, William John Diffee, was 22 and his mother, Mary Elizabeth York, was 39. He had at least 4 sons and 5 daughters with Elizabeth Ann York. He died on 2 December 1790, in Randolph, North Carolina, United States, at the age of 58, and was buried in Odell Trogdon Cemetery, Grays Chapel, Randolph, North Carolina, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Diffee Jr est né le 17 mai 1732, à Wicomico, Northumberland, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, William John Diffee, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Mary Elizabeth York, avait 39 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles avec Elizabeth Ann York. Il est décédé le 2 décembre 1790, à Randolph, Caroline du Nord, États-Unis, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à Odell Trogdon Cemetery, Grays Chapel, Randolph, Caroline du Nord, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Diffee Jr am 17. Mai 1732 in Wicomico, Northumberland, Virginia, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war sein Vater William John Diffee 22 und seine Mutter Mary Elizabeth York 39. Er hatte mit Elizabeth Ann York mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 2. Dezember 1790 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Randolph, North Carolina, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Odell Trogdon Cemetery, Grays Chapel, Randolph, North Carolina, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Diffee Jr è nato il il 17 maggio 1732 nel Wicomico, Northumberland, Virginia, British Colonial America, il suo padre, William John Diffee, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Mary Elizabeth York, aveva 39 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie con Elizabeth Ann York. Morì il 2 dicembre 1790, nel Randolph, Carolina del Nord, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolto a Odell Trogdon Cemetery, Grays Chapel, Randolph, Carolina del Nord, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: William Diffee Jrが1732年5月17日にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州ノースウンバーランドウィコミコで生まれた時，父William John Diffeeは22歳，母Mary Elizabeth Yorkは39歳であった。彼はElizabeth Ann Yorkとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼は1790年12月2日にアメリカ合衆国ノースカロライナ州ランドルフで58歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国ノースカロライナ州ランドルフグレイズ チャペルオデル トログドン セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Wicomico, Northumberland, Virginia, Brit: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 노르스벌랜드 위코믹오
ko.lifeSummary: William Diffee Jr(이)가 1732년 5월 17일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 노르스벌랜드 위코믹오에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William John Diffee(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Elizabeth York(은)는 39세였다. 그는 Elizabeth Ann York(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1790년 12월 2일 미국 노스캐롤라이나 주 랜돌프에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 노스캐롤라이나 주 랜돌프 그라이스 차플 오데 트로그던 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Diffee Jr nasceu em 17 de maio de 1732, em Wicomico, Northumberland, Virginia, British Colonial America, seu pai, William John Diffee, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Mary Elizabeth York, tinha 39 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas com Elizabeth Ann York. Ele faleceu em 2 de dezembro de 1790, em Randolph, Carolina do Norte, Estados Unidos da América, com 58 anos, e foi sepultado em Odell Trogdon Cemetery, Grays Chapel, Randolph, Carolina do Norte, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Diffee Jr родился 17 мая 1732 г. в местности викомику, нортумбирланд, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени William John Diffee было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Mary Elizabeth York, 39. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей от Elizabeth Ann York. Он умер 2 декабря 1790 г. в местности рандолф, Северная Каролина, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности оделл трогдон кеметири, греис чапел, рандолф, Северная Каролина, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Diffee Jr nació el 17 de mayo de 1732, en Wicomico, Northumberland, Virginia, British Colonial America, su papá, William John Diffee, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Mary Elizabeth York, tenía 39 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas con Elizabeth Ann York. Murió el 2 de diciembre de 1790, en Randolph, Carolina del Norte, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultado en Odell Trogdon Cemetery, Grays Chapel, Randolph, Carolina del Norte, Estados Unidos.
